description: Mountain rock — the RPG Tiles Vector pack's opaque 64px grey stone block (public/assets/tilemaps/rpg-terrain.png, cols 13-14, rows 3-4). A solid impassable stone barrier authored at native resolution, replacing the dark navy .pix band that read as a flat saturated wall. The 2×2 field varies the rock face. Solid so the rail routes around it.
